Name: Derral Sitsk
Biography:
Derral Sitsk was the youngest Lord White of Brightend. He distinguished himself at 29 while succesfully protecting the city of Marshes with his troops. His military accomplishments pushed him into politics.
Alec Teal's father, Fearn, promoted Sitsk to Lord Commander. A successful campaign to free The city-state Lemerolai got him the title of Lord White after the death of the previous holder.

Name: Hammer
Quote: Nothing beats a candy! Except a knife
Biography: Once a renowned drug dealer/adventurer, she dated Nimo. Now she changed her life and dropped her bad habits... both of them.

Name: Ledon Foll
Biography: Grand Warden Foll is well respect amongst his peers, but also revered by most citizens who recognize his dedication to the city. The towering Earth Genasi with granite-grey skin has spent his life in service of Brightend.

Name: Maera Voss
Biography: An independant scholar, specialized in paleolinguistics and antique history of the Boundless Vale. She was recently asked by Runebridge to translate a magically encrypted tome recovered in a dig site

Name: Merton Lensher
Quote: Drinking when we are not thirsty, eating when not hungry and fucking all year round is what differentiates us from common beasts
Biography: With a broad, inviting smile and striking, heterochromatic eyesď, one clear blue and one green, he commands the polished bar of his prestigious inn. A prosperous figure with a thick mane of greying brown hair and a matching full beard, Merton is dressed in a rugged yet finely detailed leather apron over a rich, gold-embroidered green tunic. His hands rest casually on the dark counter, a symbol of sturdy, welcoming hospitality in his grand, candlelit establishment.

Name: Erik Thayne
Biography: This former carpenter was married to Elira Thayne, who died in her home in mysterious circumstances. He is left heartbroken.

Name: Mystery man
Biography: A strange man tailing and taking notes of the party's whereabouts. Killed when trying to escape.
